candidate_llm_application: NDEBELE-TRIANGLE: weight-tensor triangulation mesh + equilateral-symmetry edge-length regularizer + vertex-degree topological defect detector

results.title: Learning Geometry Adaptive Manifold Metric Tensor Optimization (2025/10)
results.rationale: EXACT TWIN — triangular mesh discretization + edge-length-parameterised metric tensor + geometric complexity regularizer. Differs only by lack of explicit defect-vertex-degree detector.

results.title: TOHA Topological Divergence Attention Graphs (2025/04)
results.rationale: Topological hallucination detector on attention graphs — covers defect-detector paradigm; differs in attention-vs-weight tensor.

results.title: Logical Determinism Topological Reconstruction Geometric Essence LLM Hallucinations
results.rationale: Topological reconstruction of LLM hallucinations — direct functional twin of defect detector for hallucination.

results.title: Spectral Features Attention Maps LapEigvals (2025/02)
results.rationale: Spectral graph features on attention map — covers anomaly-detector geometric paradigm via sem+func.

results.title: HyMSS-GAD Multi-View Graph Anomaly Detection (2026)
results.rationale: Multi-view structural+geometric graph anomaly detection — covers defect-detector paradigm directly.

results.title: Awesome Deep Graph Anomaly Detection (TKDE 2025)
results.rationale: Comprehensive graph-anomaly-detection survey covers NDEBELE-TRIANGLE design space via sem+func.

results.title: Subspace Geometry Catastrophic Forgetting LoRA (2026/03)
results.rationale: Subspace geometry analysis of weight updates — covers weight-tensor geometric paradigm.

results.title: AI Defect-Based Material Design (Phys.org 2026/01)
results.rationale: Topological defect prediction (nematic crystals) — exact same problem class, transferable to weight tensors.

reason: 8 prior-art hits >= 1. NDEBELE-TRIANGLE is dominated by 2510.26068 (triangular mesh + edge-length metric tensor + geometric regularizer — exact twin), with broad coverage of the topological-defect / graph-anomaly / geometric-LLM design space across 8 distinct effect clusters. The 3-part recombination (weight-tensor triangulation + symmetry regularizer + vertex-degree defect detector) does not clear novelty bar.
recommendation: Reject. Pivot away from triangular-mesh / topological-defect / graph-anomaly framings; consider non-geometric and non-graph paradigms.
